prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: clue artifact detail. Story world: Static Between Stations. Premise: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices.. Setting: Abandoned commuter rail control annex. Threat presence: The Curator of Static. Recurring motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Create shard card for holder GLOBAL_BROADCAST. Content brief: Broadcast drop includes a map layer that aligns only with both clues.. Ensure it can stand alone but becomes decisive when combined with other shards.. Subgenre: psychological horror. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Static Between Stations - Relay Cipher Split - GLOBAL_BROADCAST Shard Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Show a physical evidence-board or clue collage with photographs, string, maps, stained paper, and marked surfaces. Prioritize tactile realism over readable text. Any writing should be minimal, blurred, or partially obscured.
